About Me

I help business owners stop being invisible online

100%
Free Audit

Hi, I am Georgia J Chase, an SEO and website audit specialist helping business owners across every industry and every country turn their websites into real client generating machines.

I have seen the same pattern repeat across hundreds of websites. A business owner puts real money and real effort into building a site. It looks good. But the phone does not ring. Enquiries do not come in. And nobody can quite figure out why.

The reason is almost always the same. The site was built to look nice, not to be found or to convert. Google cannot read it properly. Visitors cannot find what they need. And the business keeps losing clients to competitors with worse services but better optimised websites.

That is exactly the gap I fill. I audit your site personally, identify every problem that is costing you traffic and clients, and fix it so that Google rewards you and visitors take action.

The audit costs you nothing. You only invest when you are ready to grow.

Yes, Audit My Website Free
The Problem

Why great businesses stay invisible on Google

🔍

Google Cannot Find Your Pages

Without proper SEO structure, Google skips your pages entirely and sends your ideal customers to your competitors instead of you.

📱

Mobile Visitors Leave Before Reading

Over 60% of web traffic is mobile. A slow or broken mobile experience means more than half your potential clients leave before they see what you offer.

🗺️

No Clear Path to Contact You

Interested visitors still will not reach out if your site makes it hard. Confusing navigation and buried contact options quietly kill your conversions every single day.

📉

Ranking for Terms Nobody Searches

Targeting the wrong keywords makes you invisible to your real buyers. You think your SEO is working, but your actual clients cannot find you at all.

How It Works

Three steps. Zero risk. Real results.

1

Submit Your Website

Fill in the short form below with your website URL and tell me the biggest challenge your business is facing right now.

2

I Run Your Personal Audit

I personally review your site across SEO, speed, mobile, content and conversion. This is a real human review, not an automated scan.

3

You Choose What Happens Next

I send you the full audit with a clear priority list. If you want me to fix it, great. If not, the audit is yours to keep with no strings attached.

What You Get

Everything I check in your audit at no cost

  • Full SEO health check across titles, meta tags, headings and site structure
  • Keyword visibility report showing whether you rank for what your buyers actually search
  • Mobile experience review covering how your site feels and functions on phones
  • Page speed analysis identifying what is slowing you down and costing you traffic
  • Conversion flow check to see whether visitors can easily find how to contact or buy from you
  • Google indexing status showing which of your pages are actually appearing in search results
  • Competitor gap analysis revealing what your top competitors are doing that you are not
  • Priority fix list with a clear ranked breakdown of exactly what to tackle first for maximum impact

FAQ

Questions business owners ask me

Yes, completely free. My model is simple. I show you exactly what is wrong with your website at no cost. If the audit is valuable and you want me to fix things, we can discuss that. If not, the report is yours to keep. No invoice will ever arrive for the audit itself.
I deliver every audit within 48 hours of your submission. I review every site personally so I take the time needed to do it properly rather than rushing through it with automation.
You receive the full report with a prioritised fix list. From there the choice is entirely yours. You can implement the fixes yourself, pass them to a developer, or ask me to handle everything. There is no pressure in any direction.
Absolutely. Everything is written in plain English with no technical jargon. You will know exactly what each issue is, why it is costing you clients, and what needs to happen to fix it. No experience needed to understand it.
Yes. SEO has no borders and neither does my service. I work with business owners across every country. As long as you have a website and want more customers from it, geography is not a barrier.
Every business is different so I do not quote a fixed price before seeing your audit results. After your audit, if you would like my help implementing the fixes, I will put together a clear and transparent proposal. No surprises, no pressure.
Absolutely. An independent second opinion is always valuable. Many business owners who already have help discover their current setup has gaps they were not aware of. The audit gives you the full picture so you can make informed decisions.
